nodes.label: Card Pipeline (Two Ingestion Paths, One Output)
nodes.rationale: Discovery (mine phrases from native content) and Correction (turn own mistakes into cards) converge on the same Card and the same .apkg export.

nodes.label: Discovery Ingestion (Extract → Curate → Review)
nodes.rationale: Three distinct steps so the user gets both automation and control: mechanical extraction (Whisper → TranscriptSegment[]), LLM curation (provider.mine biased by an optional focus), and human-in-the-loop review — only accepted candidates flow into provider.generate().

nodes.label: Correction Ingestion (ErrorEvent Path)
nodes.rationale: The Correct tab builds ErrorEvents (typed original→corrected or JSON paste); /api/cards/generate maps them to CardSource{kind:'error'} and runs the same generateDeck, so mistakes flow into the same store, .apkg engine, FSRS scheduling, and weakness analysis as discoveries.

nodes.label: Native Clip Slicing
nodes.rationale: With Whisper timestamps the exact native audio clip for each phrase is cut and embedded in the card — authentic intonation and rhythm TTS can't deliver, something no competitor does. Text sources without timestamps fall back to Kokoro TTS.

nodes.label: Provider-Agnostic Generation Contract
nodes.rationale: Everything past generate() is provider-agnostic; the pipeline never branches on provider. All providers share one brain (shared.ts prompt/schema builders + normalizers) so they stay genuinely interchangeable, and 'run it all locally' stays a coherent private path end to end. Orchestration: generateVettedCards and generateDeck in src/lib/cards/provider.ts.

nodes.label: Critique Gate (keep / rewrite / drop)
nodes.rationale: Quality gate after generation; rewrites inherit the original card's grounding. With Ollama (the local default) the critique step is skipped — slow local LLMs don't justify the cost — leaving grounding and the per-source card cap.

nodes.label: Card Grounding
nodes.rationale: Anti-hallucination: structural (source pointer set by code, not the model, verified in generateVettedCards) plus semantic (critique drops ungrounded cards). Every card points to a real source the learner has.

nodes.label: Semantic Dedup (Embedding Cosine)
nodes.rationale: src/lib/cards/dedupe.ts — embedding cosine when the provider has an embedder (OpenAI), lexical-cosine fallback otherwise.

nodes.label: SRS Engine (ts-fsrs)
nodes.rationale: ts-fsrs wrapped in src/lib/srs/fsrs.ts with Date↔epoch-ms serialization so the due index is range-queryable. New cards start due immediately; Study shows due queue, flip-to-answer, Again/Hard/Good/Easy with live next-interval preview.

nodes.label: Weakness Detection (The Tutor)
nodes.rationale: detectWeaknesses groups the review log by concept, error type, and context, ranks by struggle rate past a min-reviews threshold; denormalized fields mean it survives card deletion. Weaknesses carry improving/worsening/stable trends read from ErrorEvent production halves.

nodes.label: Reinforcement Loop (Reforçar)
nodes.rationale: Each weak spot gets a Reforçar button pulling every card for that concept/error-type into a focused drill via getReinforcementCards, bypassing the FSRS due date — turning the weakness panel from a passive report into an action: detect → drill.

nodes.label: Directed Generation (Gerar +)
nodes.rationale: getReinforcementSources finds the PhraseCandidates/ErrorEvents behind a weakness's struggled cards; POST /api/cards/reinforce runs them back through the same generateDeck to mint fresh variant cards drilling the same concept from a new angle — grounded by construction, no new material needed, no .apkg built (variants studied in-app).

nodes.label: Conversation Practice (Converse)
nodes.rationale: Not a disconnected chatbot but another ingestion path: conversation → mistakes → cards → SRS → weaknesses → reinforcement, with the scenario as situational context. Correction runs at end of session, not per turn; push-to-talk v1; cloud usage clearly disclosed.

nodes.label: Structured 90-Day Learning Plan
nodes.rationale: LLM-generated plan from LearningProfile, split into thematic phases with concrete DailyTasks mapping to existing features; adapts automatically by comparing plan vs. actual measured effort every 7 days.

nodes.label: Activity Log
nodes.rationale: IndexedDB store recording what the user really did (cards_reviewed, video_processed, conversation_turn, correction_generated, cards_created); each feature emits events and the plan engine reads them to mark tasks done — required because each feature otherwise lives in its own state.

nodes.label: EffortSnapshot (Weekly Effort Measurement)
nodes.rationale: Weekly plannedMinutes vs actualMinutes, adherenceRate, and streak derived automatically from the activity log — no manual logging. Drives plan adaptation rules (reduce load, advance phase, recovery task).

hyperedges.label: Card Pipeline Quality Stages (mine → generate → ground → critique → dedup)
Tutor Loop (SRS → weakness detection → reinforcement → directed generation)
